name: Plain Kefir

pros.title: fermented dairy practicality is a real plus
pros.explanation: It keeps the category strengths while usually being a bit more interesting in practice.

pros.title: clear calcium identity
pros.explanation: That is a core category strength.

pros.title: easy protein delivery for normal diets
pros.explanation: Dairy gets real credit for convenience.

cons.title: processing changes the category a lot
cons.explanation: The label alone does not tell the whole story.

cons.title: some versions get dense fast on fat, sodium, or both
cons.explanation: The category swings a lot by format.

cons.title: not everyone tolerates dairy well
cons.explanation: That is a real use-case limitation.

sourceNotes: Expanded dataset sample for FoodRanked pressure-testing.
Values are approximate representative placeholders for category tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
